string.text: Dorn's Fast Travel
Main
Message Duration
How long travel notifications stay on screen (seconds). See PDA Guide > Addons > Dorn's Fast Travel for travel rules.
Block Zone Transitions in Combat
Prevents crossing a level transition (on foot or via fast travel) while an alerted enemy is actively engaging you within your outer ambush range. On by default.
Show Ambush Range on PDA Map

Draw two yellow rings on the PDA map for your ambush ranges. Outer = main range (needs line of sight). Inner = 50% of outer (triggers even without line of sight). On ambush, only the ring that caught you turns red. Both scale with time, weather, and travel mode. Off by default.
Development
Show debug overlay
Show travel debug info on screen (time until next emission).
Enable debug logging
Write extra travel details to the game log.
Path Preview on Menu Open
Show the route on the PDA when you right-click a destination, before you start travelling. Off by default.
Sneaking Level Up
Development keybind: increase Sneaking skill level by 1.
Sneaking Level Down
Development keybind: decrease Sneaking skill level by 1.
Always rebuild nav cache on load
When on, always sync-rebuild this level's coarse nav on load — ignores any matching versioned cache. Off = load the major.minor cache if present, else rebuild.
Rebuild Coarse Nav (key)
Development keybind: force sync-rebuild the per-level coarse nav graph and overwrite the current major.minor cache. When bound, the graph is shown on the PDA map.
